<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">About this list</h2><a id="user-content-about-this-list" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: About this list" href="#about-this-list"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Awesome Open Source AI is a curated list of open-source projects for people building with AI.</p>
<p dir="auto">The goal is to help readers find useful models, libraries, tools, infrastructure, datasets, and learning resources without sorting through a directory dump.</p>
<p dir="auto">Projects do not need a minimum number of GitHub stars to be included. Stars can be useful context, but they are only one signal. A smaller project may belong here if it is useful, well-maintained, technically interesting, clearly documented, or important to a specific part of the AI ecosystem.</p>
<p dir="auto">Good entries should have a clear reason to exist. They should help people build, study, run, evaluate, or understand AI systems.</p>
<hr>

Core Frameworks & Libraries</h2><a id="user-content-1-core-frameworks--libraries" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. <p dir="auto">Core libraries and frameworks used to build, train, and run AI and machine learning systems.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Deep Learning Frameworks</h4><a id="user-content-deep-learning-frameworks" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Deep Learning Frameworks" href="#deep-learning-frameworks"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch">PyTorch</a> - Dynamic computation graphs, Pythonic API, dominant in research and production. The current standard for most frontier AI work. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/149024b3177bfbf68dfc747badbcd60c1a3c88e4955410f1775084d24faa9ce0/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f7079746f7263682f7079746f7263683f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/149024b3177bfbf68dfc747badbcd60c1a3c88e4955410f1775084d24faa9ce0/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f7079746f7263682f7079746f7263683f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/pytorch/pytorch?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/tensorflow/tensorflow">TensorFlow</a> - End-to-end platform with excellent production deployment, TPU support, and large-scale serving tools. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/3e141bb93e6f3d38cdd0b3fe57cb1b350d57e4032a33d3955dc4203faa0e0747/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f74656e736f72666c6f772f74656e736f72666c6f773f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/3e141bb93e6f3d38cdd0b3fe57cb1b350d57e4032a33d3955dc4203faa0e0747/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f74656e736f72666c6f772f74656e736f72666c6f773f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/tensorflow/tensorflow?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/jax-ml/jax">JAX</a> - High-performance numerical computing with composable transformations (JIT, vmap, grad). Rising favorite for research and scientific ML. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/73fa9226dd9d9862a0ed724db183fefcd3ba668fc386804f0f9c22d6003ac012/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f6a61782d6d6c2f6a61783f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/73fa9226dd9d9862a0ed724db183fefcd3ba668fc386804f0f9c22d6003ac012/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f6a61782d6d6c2f6a61783f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/jax-ml/jax?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a> + <strong><a href="https://github.com/google/flax">Flax</a></strong> <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/0520aaa46bf8e68b7d6ef9b16db4faf998caf15e946a099cf5e42fe8f7c13055/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f676f6f676c652f666c61783f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/0520aaa46bf8e68b7d6ef9b16db4faf998caf15e946a099cf5e42fe8f7c13055/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f676f6f676c652f666c61783f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/google/flax?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/google-deepmind/dm-haiku">dm-haiku</a> - JAX-based neural network library from Google DeepMind. Elegant functional API with state management, widely used in DeepMind's research. Apache 2.0 licensed. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/48c2686cb40f9cadc089c73c1216f2362e83317ea8e676ed682eeffe1f1de682/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f676f6f676c652d646565706d696e642f646d2d6861696b753f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/48c2686cb40f9cadc089c73c1216f2362e83317ea8e676ed682eeffe1f1de682/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f676f6f676c652d646565706d696e642f646d2d6861696b753f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/google-deepmind/dm-haiku?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/patrick-kidger/equinox">Equinox</a> - Elegant easy-to-use neural networks and scientific computing in JAX. Callable PyTrees with filtered transformations, seamless interoperability with the JAX ecosystem. Apache 2.0 licensed. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/62bb758907d240734961ab50295fd958b5a96d046e22db3f0dc831e6098c20ee/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f7061747269636b2d6b69646765722f657175696e6f783f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/62bb758907d240734961ab50295fd958b5a96d046e22db3f0dc831e6098c20ee/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f7061747269636b2d6b69646765722f657175696e6f783f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/patrick-kidger/equinox?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/patrick-kidger/diffrax">Diffrax</a> - Numerical differential equation solvers in JAX. Autodifferentiable and GPU-capable ODE/SDE/CDE solvers for scientific machine learning and neural differential equations. Apache 2.0 licensed. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/0cb6b0ba14b2671e1284dbf77eeff5d4d4bec12186f0a88b44c795a114a3d41d/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f7061747269636b2d6b69646765722f646966667261783f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/0cb6b0ba14b2671e1284dbf77eeff5d4d4bec12186f0a88b44c795a114a3d41d/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f7061747269636b2d6b69646765722f646966667261783f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/patrick-kidger/diffrax?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/lucidrains/vit-pytorch">vit-pytorch</a> - Comprehensive Vision Transformer (ViT) implementations in PyTorch. Reference implementations of all major vision transformer variants including ViT, DeiT, Swin, and more. MIT licensed. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/f79832b30ff033b2aa7bf5b52a76f84b1b47d116cdccd6e6e2c4be93efdc3f58/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f6c756369647261696e732f7669742d7079746f7263683f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/f79832b30ff033b2aa7bf5b52a76f84b1b47d116cdccd6e6e2c4be93efdc3f58/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f6c756369647261696e732f7669742d7079746f7263683f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/lucidrains/vit-pytorch?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/pyro-ppl/numpyro">NumPyro</a> - Probabilistic programming with NumPy powered by JAX for autograd and JIT compilation. Bayesian modeling and inference at scale. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/e273fd9aa673114a8ef0fbba7f98b9e3fa7d9479f686350c0f9402373333cc0c/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f7079726f2d70706c2f6e756d7079726f3f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/e273fd9aa673114a8ef0fbba7f98b9e3fa7d9479f686350c0f9402373333cc0c/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f7079726f2d70706c2f6e756d7079726f3f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/pyro-ppl/numpyro?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/keras-team/keras">Keras</a> - High-level, beginner-friendly API that now runs on multiple backends (TensorFlow, JAX, PyTorch). Perfect for rapid experimentation. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/d1c6c2cab6833d53cde9abf7128f9fde66b4671c6f2fc40bf0f3cf0845b46907/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f6b657261732d7465616d2f6b657261733f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/d1c6c2cab6833d53cde9abf7128f9fde66b4671c6f2fc40bf0f3cf0845b46907/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f6b657261732d7465616d2f6b657261733f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/keras-team/keras?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/tinygrad/tinygrad">tinygrad</a> - Minimalist deep learning framework with tiny code footprint. The "you like PyTorch? you like micrograd? you love tinygrad!" philosophy - simple yet powerful. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/b6888600f311d0a48376c942b5645f1a04b12d1c273dfde17fac1772b4befbb0/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f74696e79677261642f74696e79677261643f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/b6888600f311d0a48376c942b5645f1a04b12d1c273dfde17fac1772b4befbb0/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f74696e79677261642f74696e79677261643f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/tinygrad/tinygrad?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/Paddle">PaddlePaddle</a> - Industrial deep learning platform from Baidu serving 23+ million developers and 760,000+ companies. Apache 2.0 licensed. <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/7a4b6775ad682761fadcfd1224b615ad6a5d5d0d9199af104f807a6ee855a59e/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f6a696e6779616f676f6e672f6d696e696d696e643f7374796c653d736f6369616c"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/7a4b6775ad682761fadcfd1224b615ad6a5d5d0d9199af104f807a6ee855a59e/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f73746172732f6a696e6779616f676f6e672f6d696e696d696e643f7374796c653d736f6369616c" alt="GitHub stars" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/jingyaogong/minimind?style=social" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></li>
